prestazioni: LT4 6.2L Supercharged V8 (engine code: LT4) with a Whipple 3.0L Gen 5 W185ax supercharger upgrade, replacing the stock 1.7L Eaton TVS unit, paired with a custom billet crankshaft pulley (ATI Super Damper) to reduce parasitic loss and increase boost to 14 psi (stock: 9.5 psi).

Full titanium exhaust system by Borla (1 7/8" primary headers with 3" merge collectors) featuring a straight-pipe design with quad 4.5" carbon-fiber tips, eliminating the stock NPP active exhaust valves for a 30% reduction in backpressure and a 40 HP gain at the wheels.

Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Camaro-specific valving) with adjustable ride height, 24-position rebound damping, and 18-position compression damping, paired with Eibach ERS 1,200 lb/in front and 1,000 lb/in rear springs for track-focused stiffness and a 20mm lower center of gravity.
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (ZL1 1LE-specific) with carbon-fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a duckbill rear spoiler, increasing track width by 3.5" for aggressive stance and improved aerodynamics (200 lbs of downforce at 120 mph).

Custom carbon-fiber hood by Seibon with a 50mm cowl induction scoop and heat-extracting vents, replacing the stock ZL1 1LE hood to reduce weight by 12 lbs and improve airflow to the Whipple supercharger.

APR Performance GTC-300 adjustable carbon-fiber rear wing (300mm chord) with integrated Gurney flap, mounted on custom billet aluminum pedestals for a 30-degree angle of attack, generating 350 lbs of downforce at 150 mph while maintaining OEM-level fitment.
